title: hieracium suborbicans
intro: Hieracium suborbicans, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's Paintbrush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting healing, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Hieracium suborbicans can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health needs.
